ricorn (Makara)
sign indicates the Karma I deed (fruit of one's action). The
Aquarius (Kumbha) sign indicate thegains. Pisces sign indicates
the destruction. The destruction means whatever the native
earned by god (Virutuel earned by virtuous life) or bad deeds
(Sin/wicked act) will be spent here. When counted from Aries
(Mesha), the 12 house becomes the Pisces (Meena), the house
ofloss I expenditure.
A native born in Aries (Mesha), will see his family as a
gain Taurus (Vrishabha). As said earlier, Mithuna (Gemini) will
show the sexual union. then comes the significator of Mother
Chandra (Moon) & the royal planet's sign Leo (Sirnha). Lord
of Simha is Ravi (Sun) who gives position. Saturn (Sani) is
thel ord of Profession I Karma (Deed). Lord of Kumbha
(Aquarius) is also Saturn (Sani). But the lord of Capricorn
(Makara) tells theProfession (Karma). That means lOth house
from Mesha (Aries) will be having the lordship of Saturn (Sani)
